headline: S&P 500 Movers: Trade Desk Surges on CEO Buy, Palantir Rides Geopolitical Wave, CrowdStrike Earnings Impress
summary: The S&P 500 (SPY) fell nearly 2% on the week, while the Nasdaq 100 dropped about 1.2% and the Russell 2000 small-cap index tumbled over 4%. The VIX fear gauge climbed to 29.49, and is now up 70% in the past month, reflecting genuine investor unease. Geopolitical tension in the Middle East, tariff uncertainty, and a ... S&P 500 Movers: Trade Desk Surges on CEO Buy, Palantir Rides Geopolitical Wave, CrowdStrike Earnings Impress

headline: Trade Desk Weighs OpenAI ChatGPT Ad Tie Up As CEO Boosts Stake
summary: The Trade Desk (NasdaqGM:TTD) has entered early talks with OpenAI about an ad partnership for ChatGPT. The discussions focus on using The Trade Desk's platform to help manage and scale advertising within ChatGPT's services. CEO Jeff Green has made the largest insider share purchase in the company's history, increasing his personal stake. The Trade Desk runs a demand side advertising platform that helps marketers buy and measure digital ad campaigns across channels such as connected TV,...
